evals.prompt: Build me a notification dropdown component. When you click a bell icon in the nav bar it should show a list of recent notifications with unread indicators, timestamps, and a 'mark all as read' button.
evals.expected_output: A Svelte component using Tailwind CSS with dark mode support, bell icon toggle, dropdown panel with notification items, unread dot indicators, relative timestamps, and a mark-all-read button. Should include hover states, transitions, and proper accessibility.
expectations: Output is a .svelte file (or files)
Uses Tailwind CSS utility classes for all styling
Includes dark mode variants (dark: prefix classes)
Has a bell icon that toggles the dropdown
Shows unread indicators on notification items
Includes timestamps on notifications
Has a 'mark all as read' button or equivalent
Includes hover/focus states on interactive elements
Uses semantic HTML (button elements for actions, not div onclick)

evals.prompt: Create a settings page with a sidebar nav that has sections for Profile, Account, Notifications, and Appearance. The Profile section should have a form with avatar upload, name, email, and bio fields.
evals.expected_output: A settings page with a left sidebar navigation listing the 4 sections, and a main content area showing the Profile form. Should use Tailwind, support dark mode, be responsive (sidebar collapses on mobile), and have properly labeled form inputs.
expectations: Output contains a settings page layout with sidebar navigation
Sidebar lists Profile, Account, Notifications, and Appearance sections
Profile section contains form fields for name, email, and bio
Includes an avatar upload area or placeholder
Uses Tailwind CSS utility classes for all styling
Includes dark mode variants (dark: prefix classes)
Form inputs have associated labels
Layout is responsive (handles mobile viewport)
Includes a save/submit button for the form

evals.prompt: Build a dashboard page that shows 4 stat cards at the top (total users, revenue, orders, conversion rate), a line chart placeholder below, and a recent orders table with columns for order ID, customer, amount, status badge, and date.
evals.expected_output: A dashboard page with a 4-column stat card grid, a chart placeholder section, and a data table. Should use Tailwind, support dark mode, have status badges with semantic colors, and be responsive.
expectations: Shows 4 stat cards with labels and values
Stat cards include total users, revenue, orders, and conversion rate
Contains a chart placeholder or chart area
Has a table with order ID, customer, amount, status, and date columns
Status column uses colored badges
Uses Tailwind CSS utility classes for all styling
Includes dark mode variants (dark: prefix classes)
Stat cards grid is responsive (collapses on smaller screens)
Table has proper thead/tbody structure with th and td elements
